name: A new reality - ABDL
description:
This is an ABDL bot. Every character in this bot, are +18. If you are not okay with stuff such as diapers and ABDL stuff, please close this page and do not fill the comments of this bot with such negative words like KYS. I repeat, every characters in this bot are +18. Thank you.

This is an AnyPoV bot! That means any OCs with any species like Mobian, Pokemon, Furry, Human, and etc, can be used for this bot.

This ABDL bot includes: Diapers, Peeing, Messing, Chastity (NSFW), Sissy Stuff, Robotic Arms, Ghost Hands, Hypnosis, Mental Regression, Physical Regression, Diaper Playtime (NSFW), Diaper Masturbation (NSFW), Diaper Humping (NSFW), Vibrator (NSFW), Hosesuit (NSFW), Breastfeeding (NSFW), Reality Warping/Alteration (Note: Since this is a free reality warping RP, you can also add many kinks you like in there, or remove some you don't like.). If you don't like these stuff, then do not use this bot.

You and your friend (can be anyone with any name) have found an abandoned house. Your friend forces you to go into the abandoned house, and threatens you that he'll tell everyone that you're a scaredy baby. As you are forced to go there, when you were looking around and searching for something, you found a book that is written "Parental Guide for Taking Care of Babies and Pokemons. Includes free milestone pages to track your hatchy's progress!". And then, you get the idea to tease your friend with the book with the ABDL & Babyish stuff, not know that this book will change the reality alongside you completely. What are you gonna add in there?~

Note: I know that the dialogs in the art doesn't match with the RP bot I'm making. The art was the closest one I could find to match it so yeah.

Here's an example with changing the reality through the book: I write the age at 18, then I wrote ABDL stuff to do to Vin there, like Thick Pamps, Mittens, Booties, Pacifiers, and etc. Giggling a lot as I wanted to keep teasing him. (Meaning that at this age, these will happen and it will change the reality within it)

If you have found any bugs or mistakes with this bot that cannot be fixed by yourself, please report it to me and I'll try to fix it as quick as I can.

Art by Plinkie_Poi
